title: d3st1ny's Overdrive
body:
# A client that is focused on all the info you get from your game.

### Fully configurable and ready to run.

* Know what you're looking at with *Jade*
* Tweak Minecraft to the best with *Tweakeroo* \*\*
* Make big plans of buildings, redstone contraptions and farms with *Litematica*
* Display extra tooltips with *Inspecio*, and extra achievements with *AdvancementInfo*
* Win boat drag-races more often with *BoatHUD*
* Record your journey with Xaero's wonderful map mods (*Minimap* and *World Map*)
* Increase your FPS and enjoy Minecraft with shaders thanks to many graphical performance-boost mods
* Enjoy more particle effects and sounds with *Visuality* and *AmbientSounds*
* Never forget a recipe with *REI* and it's *plugins*
* Bring back XBOX360/PS3 vibes by using a controller with *MidnightControls*
* And much more...  
> \*\*:    Some servers do not like semi-legal kind of block placement, so use this one carefully on servers.

Available on Modrinth and Moddermore (<https://moddermore.net/list/388f9bc9ff>)

Thanks to all the mods' creators.  
Made by **@d3st1nyoff** for mainly personal use, feel free to modify the pack as you wish.
